es.optOutConfirmation: Entendido. No enviaremos mas mensajes automaticos. Si necesitas ayuda mas adelante, puedes escribirnos de nuevo.
es.adventureClarifier: Para que lo tengas claro: lo que hacemos no es turismo convencional. Son experiencias de aventura real con comunidad local, naturaleza, esfuerzo fisico y contacto genuino con la tierra. Si buscas algo autentico y diferente, es por aca. ¿Te animas?
es.askPlan: Perfecto {{name}}! ¿Que tipo de experiencia te interesa: naturaleza, cultura local, aventura, descanso rural o algo mas especifico? Asi te cuento mejor.
es.askDate: Genial. ¿Para que fecha lo tienen pensado?
es.askTransport: Listo. ¿Tienen transporte propio o lo necesitan desde Bogota?
es.aiFailureQualified: Te leo. Dejame validar bien este detalle antes de confirmarte algo incorrecto y te escribo enseguida.
es.aiBudgetExhausted: Justo ahora no puedo responderte con la precision que merece tu caso. Me encargo personalmente y te escribo enseguida.
es.llmFailureWarm: {{name}}, justo ahora se me complico cargar la informacion. ¿Me escribes por Instagram @andeanscapes? Te respondo personalmente en un momento.
es.messageLimitReached: Te leo. Dame un momento y sigo contigo bien para no responderte a medias.
es.messageLimitHandoff: Te leo. Para no responderte a medias, sigo yo personalmente desde aqui. Te respondo en breve.
es.messageLimitAfterPrice: Te leo. Para no confundirte con el valor, dejame revisarlo bien y te confirmo enseguida.
es.messageLimitAfterPriceAfterHours: Te leo. Para no confundirte con el valor, dejame revisarlo bien; por la hora en Colombia, te confirmo mañana en la mañana.
es.messageLimitAfterPriceMorningHours: Te leo. Para no confundirte con el valor, dejame revisarlo bien; por la hora en Colombia, te confirmo después de las 9:00 a.m.
es.softCloseReply: Entendido. Si mas adelante te interesa, aca estoy para contarte mas. Si quieres mas info, seguinos en IG: {{instagramUrl}}
es.handoffMessage: Perfecto {{name}}! Confirmo el cupo y te paso los datos de pago. Te escribo en un toque.
es.repairPriceNotPresented: Genial {{name}}! El plan en pareja queda en ${{couplePrice}} COP, todo incluido (alojamiento, comidas, mina). ¿Qué te parece? ¿Es lo que buscabas?
es.repairPricePresented: ¿Qué te parece {{name}}? ¿Es lo que buscabas? ¿Te gustaría reservar?
es.handedOffVariant0: Ya tengo tus datos y te confirmo pronto. Cualquier duda, aca estoy.
es.handedOffVariant1: Ya tengo tu info anotada. Te confirmo en breve. Quedo atento por si necesitas algo mas.
es.handedOffQuestion: Ya tengo tus datos. Si me estas preguntando algo, dejame revisarlo bien y te confirmo en breve.
es.handedOffTypo: Perdon, no te entendi bien. Ya tengo tus datos y te confirmo pronto. Si era algo urgente, dime de nuevo.
es.handedOffThanks: Con gusto. Te confirmo en breve. Quedo atento por si necesitas algo mas.
es.disculpaYaDicho: Tienes razon {{name}}, disculpa. Ya lo tengo anotado. {{continuation}}
es.objectionResolvedContinue: {{name}}, me alegra que estes bien con eso. Entonces, ¿quieres que revisemos disponibilidad para la fecha tentativa?
es.partnerConsultSummary:
Dale {{name}}, cero afan. Te dejo resumen corto para que lo mires con tu pareja: {{experienceSummary}} {{priceLine}}

Si les suena, cuando tengan fecha clara me escribes y validamos disponibilidad.
es.safeReservationHandoff: Perfecto {{name}}, ya lo tengo todo. Son {{summary}}. Confirmo fecha exacta y te paso los datos de pago. Te escribo en un toque.
es.safeReservationHandoffAlt1: Listo {{name}}. Me encanta el plan para {{summary}}. Confirmo fecha y disponibilidad y te envio los datos. Cualquier cosa, aca estoy.
es.safeReservationHandoffAlt2: Excelente {{name}}, que emocion. Ya tengo todo anotado: {{summary}}. Te confirmo en breve. Quedo atento por si necesitas algo mas.
es.safeReservationHandoffAfterHours: Perfecto {{name}}, ya lo tengo todo. Son {{summary}}. Lo reviso bien; por la hora en Colombia, te confirmo mañana en la mañana con fecha exacta y datos de pago.
es.safeReservationHandoffMorningHours: Perfecto {{name}}, ya lo tengo todo. Son {{summary}}. Lo reviso bien; por la hora en Colombia, te confirmo después de las 9:00 a.m. con fecha exacta y datos de pago.
es.referralHandoff: Perfecto {{name}}, ya lo tengo todo. Son {{summary}}. {{agentName}} te va a contactar desde {{displayNumber}} para confirmar fecha exacta, disponibilidad y datos de pago.
es.answerQuestionBeforeQualification: Claro. Para reservar, primero confirmo fecha exacta y datos de pago. Sobre la experiencia: segun el plan que elijas, incluye alojamiento, comidas y actividades en campo con guia y equipo. La hora exacta la confirmo segun la fecha.
es.priceUnavailable: Estamos ajustando precios y fechas en este momento. Dejame confirmarlo y te paso la info exacta enseguida. ¿Para cuantas personas y que fecha tienes en mente?
es.dateSelectedLimited: Perfecto, tomo {{date}} como fecha tentativa. Te confirmo disponibilidad exacta. ¿Quieres que lo dejemos para revisión de reserva?
es.dateSelectedLimitedNoDate: Perfecto, tomo nota de tu fecha tentativa. Te confirmo disponibilidad exacta. ¿Quieres que lo dejemos para revision de reserva?
es.systemErrorRetry: Perdon, se me fue la senal. Me repites lo ultimo?
es.galleryIntro: Aqui un ejemplo de nuestra experiencia por si te animas.

en.optOutConfirmation: Understood. We won't send more automated messages. If you need help later, you can message us again.
en.askName: Before we continue, what is your name?
en.adventureClarifier: Just so you know: what we do is not conventional tourism. These are real adventure experiences with the local community, nature, physical effort, and genuine connection to the land. If you are looking for something authentic and different, this is it. Are you in?
en.askPlan: Great {{name}}! What type of experience are you interested in: nature, local culture, adventure, rural escape, or something more specific? That way I can tell you more.
en.askPeople: Perfect! How many people would be coming?
en.askDate: Great. What date are you thinking of?
en.askTransport: Got it. Do you have your own transport or need it from Bogota?
en.aiFailureQualified: I'm here. Let me double-check this detail before confirming anything inaccurate and I'll write you right back.
en.aiBudgetExhausted: I can't answer with the accuracy your case deserves right now. I'll handle it personally and write you right away.
en.llmFailureWarm: {{name}}, I'm having trouble loading the info right now. Can you message us on Instagram @andeanscapes? I'll respond personally shortly.
en.messageLimitReached: I'm here. Give me a moment so I can continue properly and not answer halfway.
en.messageLimitHandoff: I'm here. To give you a proper response, I'll keep helping you personally from here. I'll reply shortly.
en.messageLimitAfterPrice: I'm here. To avoid confusing you about the price, let me review it properly and I'll confirm right away.
en.messageLimitAfterPriceAfterHours: I'm here. To avoid confusing you about the price, let me review it properly; because of the time in Colombia, I'll confirm tomorrow morning.
en.messageLimitAfterPriceMorningHours: I'm here. To avoid confusing you about the price, let me review it properly; because of the time in Colombia, I'll confirm after 9:00 a.m.
en.softCloseReply: Understood. If you're interested later, I'm here to tell you more. For more info, follow us on IG: {{instagramUrl}}
en.handoffMessage: Perfect {{name}}! I'll confirm your spot and send you the payment details. I'll be in touch shortly.
en.repairPriceNotPresented: Great {{name}}! Couple price is ${{couplePrice}} COP all-inclusive (lodging, meals, mine). What do you think? Is this what you were looking for?
en.repairPricePresented: What do you think, {{name}}? Is this what you were looking for? Would you like to book it?
en.handedOffVariant0: I already have your info and I'll confirm shortly. Any questions, I'm here.
en.handedOffVariant1: I've got your info noted. I'll confirm shortly. Let me know if you need anything else.
en.handedOffQuestion: I already have your info. If you're asking something, let me check it properly and I'll get back to you shortly.
en.handedOffTypo: Sorry, I didn't catch that. I already have your info and I'll confirm soon. If it was urgent, tell me again.
en.handedOffThanks: Of course! I'll be in touch shortly. Let me know if you need anything else.
en.disculpaYaDicho: You're right {{name}}, sorry. I already have it noted. {{continuation}}
en.objectionResolvedContinue: {{name}}, glad you're comfortable with that. So, would you like us to check availability for the tentative date?
en.partnerConsultSummary:
Sure {{name}}, no rush. Here is a short summary to share with your partner: {{experienceSummary}} {{priceLine}}

If it feels right, message me when you have a clear date and we validate availability.
en.safeReservationHandoff: Perfect {{name}}, got everything down. It's {{summary}}. I'll confirm the exact date and send you the payment details. I'll be in touch shortly.
en.safeReservationHandoffAlt1: Great {{name}}. Love the plan for {{summary}}. I'll confirm the date and real availability and send you the details. Anything else, I'm here.
en.safeReservationHandoffAlt2: Excellent {{name}}, exciting! I've got everything noted: {{summary}}. I'll confirm shortly. Let me know if you need anything else.
en.safeReservationHandoffAfterHours: Perfect {{name}}, got everything down. It's {{summary}}. I'll review it; because of the time in Colombia, I'll confirm tomorrow morning with the exact date and payment details.
en.safeReservationHandoffMorningHours: Perfect {{name}}, got everything down. It's {{summary}}. I'll review it; because of the time in Colombia, I'll confirm after 9:00 a.m. with the exact date and payment details.
en.referralHandoff: Perfect {{name}}, got everything down. It's {{summary}}. {{agentName}} will contact you from {{displayNumber}} to confirm the exact date, availability, and payment details.
en.answerQuestionBeforeQualification: Sure. To book, I first confirm the exact date and payment details. About the experience: depending on the plan you choose, it includes lodging, meals, and field activities with a guide and equipment. Exact time is confirmed based on the date.
en.priceUnavailable: We're updating prices and dates right now. Let me confirm and send you the exact info shortly. For how many people and what date are you thinking?
en.dateSelectedLimited: Perfect, I'll take {{date}} as the tentative date. I'll confirm exact availability. Would you like us to review it for reservation?
en.dateSelectedLimitedNoDate: Perfect, I'll note your tentative date. I'll confirm exact availability. Would you like us to review it for reservation?
en.itineraryReply: Sure {{name}}, here is the clear version. {{itinerarySummary}}
en.systemErrorRetry: Sorry, bad connection. Can you say that again?
en.galleryIntro: Here's a sample of our experience in case you're interested.
